name: python3-pyexcel-xls
title: python3-pyexcel-xls
summary: Wrapper library to manipulate data in xls using xlrd and xlwt (Python 3)
description:
Wrapper library to manipulate data in xls using xlrd and xlwt (Python 3)
This package contains a tiny wrapper library to read, manipulate and write
data in xls format and it can read xlsx and xlsm fromat. You are likely to use
it with pyexcel.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyexcel-xls because Wrapper library to manipulate data in xls using xlrd and xlwt (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyexcel-xls as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyexcel-xls with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyexcel-xls --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
